title: Buses
description: Free shuttle buses are available from Parramatta Station to Parramatta Leagues Club. From here, it is approximately a 10-minute walk to 1 Fleet Street at Parramatta North. Alternatively, bus routes 549, 550, 600, 601, 603, 604, 606, 609, 625, and 706 can be taken from Parramatta Station to bus stops: O'Connell Street opposite Harold Street or O'Connell Street after Albert Street.

title: Light Rail
description: Take the Parramatta Light Rail to Ngara Station located on Factory Street inside the Parramatta North precinct.

title: Parking
description: There is limited parking available on Fleet Street and surrounding streets.
